sourceTitle: Notification to Students on the Use of AI Tools in Classes (ver 1.0)
evidenceSnippetOriginal: It has been suggested that the output of AI tools, not just generative ones, may potentially pose problems related to copyright and design rights. Therefore, it is important to note that using generated results as is may entail legal risks in the future.
